meaning: <日>n.(空手道的)形(即套路,练习时必须按形进行),(柔道)招数的类型[日文汉字:形,型]
examples: That massive inselberg is known as Kata Tjuta.
Kata: Sorry, I can't sing the song.
It appeared to be the perfect tuna, a vision of true kata.
In the carefree 1960s, two Amsterdam students, Kata and Stefan, fall in love at first sight.
Kata Tjuta means "many heads" and is of great tjukurpa significance, so climbing on the domed rocks is not advised.
